title: Dendromyza acrosclera
taxonomy: Dendromyza acrosclera is a species of fungus within the family Dendromyzaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota, a group of fungi characterized by the presence of ascospores. The classification of Dendromyza acrosclera further places it within the class Dothideomycetes, a class of fungi known for their saprotrophic lifestyle. This classification is based on the fungus's morphological characteristics and genetic features. Further research is needed to fully understand the relationships within the Dendromyzaceae family and the place of Dendromyza acrosclera within it.
